backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the ICP backend that includes the MixinStorage blob-storage mixin to compose its functionality.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report confirming the Google Search Console verification meta tag was added to frontend/index.html, with associated components and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document containing one-sentence summaries of all frontend source files, describing their purpose and key changes.
frontend/.env.production: Production environment file setting DFX_NETWORK to 'ic' and NODE_ENV to 'production' for ICP mainnet deployments.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH-based CSS custom properties for light and dark mode color themes including backgrounds, borders, charts, and sidebar tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with comprehensive SEO meta tags, Open Graph, Twitter Card, geo tags, JSON-LD structured data, and the Google Search Console verification meta tag.
frontend/public/robots.txt: Robots.txt allowing all crawlers and pointing to the sitemap URL at ramasHomefoods.com.
frontend/public/sitemap.xml: XML sitemap listing the main page and all anchor section URLs for ramasHomefoods.com with priorities and change frequencies.
frontend/README.md: Deployment and development documentation for Rama's Home Foods ICP site, covering prerequisites, local dev setup, and mainnet deployment steps.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component managing basket state and rendering all page sections (Navbar, Hero, AboutUs, Products, WhyChooseUs, Offers, Reviews, Contact, Footer) along with floating UI elements.
frontend/src/components/AboutUs.tsx: About Us section component displaying the brand story, quality pillars (RO Water, No Preservatives, Natural Fermentation, No Salt/Soda), value cards, and a batter preparation image with accessibility attributes.
frontend/src/components/BasketSummary.ts: Fixed bottom-right collapsible basket panel showing item quantities, per-kg pricing, a running total, and a WhatsApp CTA that pre-fills an order message.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Renders the Contact Us section with business info, address cards, phone/email/WhatsApp links, operating hours, quality highlights, and an embedded Google Maps link for Rama's Home Foods.
frontend/src/components/FloatingWhatsApp: A fixed floating WhatsApp button in the bottom-left corner with pulse animation and a tooltip that appears on hover, linking to the business WhatsApp number.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand info, quick navigation links, contact details, WhatsApp/Zomato order buttons, and a sitemap dialog triggered by a footer link.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, brand logo, headline, star rating, and CTA buttons for WhatsApp ordering and scrolling to the About section.
frontend/src/components/Navbar.tsx: Fixed top navigation bar with smooth-scroll links, active section highlighting, a mobile hamburger menu, and a WhatsApp order CTA button.
frontend/src/components/Offers.tsx: Displays special offers (discount cards) and a prominent Zomato online ordering banner with a deep-link to the Zomato partner app listing.
frontend/src/components/Products.tsx: Defines a list of 5 South Indian batter products and renders them as cards with quantity controls and an add-to-basket action.
frontend/src/components/Reviews.tsx: Displays a grid of 4 hardcoded customer testimonials with star ratings, quote text, and customer initials avatars.
frontend/src/components/Sitemap.tsx: Renders a navigable site map panel listing all page sections with icons and descriptions, scrolling to each section on click.
frontend/src/components/WhyChooseUs.tsx: Renders a dark-themed section showcasing 9 feature cards (e.g., RO water, no preservatives, FSSAI approval) explaining the brand's quality commitments.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and hook, managing AuthClient creation, login, logout, and identity persistence across page reloads.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, and defines a warm spice/terracotta color palette via CSS custom properties for both light and dark modes, plus reusable component classes and keyframe animations.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with oklch-based brand color tokens (spice, saffron, cream, ink), custom font families, border radii, box shadows, and typography/animate plugins.
project_state.json: Project state metadata tracking version, existing features, and a pending action request to add a Google Search Console verification meta tag to the site's HTML head.
